title: Krieg Unleashes Poison Gas
scene: On pages 10–13, the Baratie conflict focuses on Luffy, Sanji, Don Krieg, Gin, Zeff. Luffy finally shatters Krieg’s pride and ends the battle at the Baratie.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ahhhhh!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Don Krieg!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: way to go, errand boyy!!!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: H... He really did it!

dialogue.speaker: Baratie cooks
dialogue.text: He defeated the pirate fleet Admiral Don Krieg...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: If the fleet that Krieg amassed,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Along with the hundreds of his weapons, armours, and even his poison gas can be seen as his "might,"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Then the "spear" of that boy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: is his own brand of might all the same.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Spear...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: No matter how many hundreds of weapons or armour one is equipped with,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They're no match for that "one special spear" that comes from your guts...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: conviction...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Don! Hang in there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Damn it! How could our Don have been...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I happen to know of a certain idiot,

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: who'd stifle that very spear for no good reason...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What're you sitting there for? Hurry up and go rescue him 'cause he ain't coming back up on his own.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Those with special abilities obtained from devil fruits are hated by the sea and can't swim.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: WHA! You damn geezer, you should've told me that sooner!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: HmF...

summary: This part keeps the Baratie battle centered on willpower, debt, hunger, and pride. The dialogue shows who still stands firm after Krieg’s violence and who is ready to break away from the restaurant’s old life.
